titleStmt.title: SII 20.188: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 188. (B.K. No. 75 of 1936-37.) PAḌAGĀNŪR, SINDGI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up in the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 113[1], Vibhava, Kārtika, s11u. 13, Thursday. Taking the S11aka year to be current, the details correspond to A.D. 1208, October 23, Thursday.

The inscription seems to record a gift of land to the temple of Acahalēśvara at Paḍa[ti]ganūru entrusted to the āchārya (name lost) of Svayaṁbhu Kēdārēśvara at Vijayāpura, called Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇāsi, when Kapiladēva-daṇdanāyaka was governing Tarddavāḍi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . Ōṁ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra
cāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūstaṁbhāya
saṁbhavē © svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpa ca
kravartti siṁgaṇadēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ dēvagiriya nelevīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁ
kathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ kapiladēvadaṁḍanāyakaru tarddavāḍināḍanāḷuttaṁ sukhadiniruttamire
© sakavarṣada 1131 neya vibhavasaṁvatsarada kārttika suddha 13 brahaspativāra
daṁdu śrīmadakṣiṇavāraṇāsi śrīvijayāpurada śrī svayaṁbhu kēdārēśva
radēvara sthānadācārya ya paḍatiganūra
śrīma
Acalēśvaradēvara
worn out
mūḍalu
mattaru 15 yagalada 12 nī
ḷa 14 ṟa nivēśana rige koṭṭaru ©
© mattavā yilāradēvara Aṁgabhō
ga raṁgapūje yaṁ maneyuvaṁtanitu
vaṁ sarvvanamaśyavāgi biṭṭaru . Ī dharmmama Ā sthā
nadācāryyā pratipāḷisuvaru .
siddhanāthanāya
worn out
mailārada
līlayā sōyaṁ siddhavipaścitē suravarō da
dyāśriyaṁ śāśvatīṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharaḥ ṣaṣṭhirvva
ruśasahaprāṇe viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . dharmmamanoldu kā
yda manujaṁgāyuṁ yaśa śrīyumamikkudaṁ kāyada pāpige Ekkōṭi munīṁdraraṁ
kapileyaṁ vēdāḍhyaraṁ koṁda sāṟidapapudu saiḷākṣarabrājigaḷuṁ .
Digital edition of SII 20.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
